title: Woven Willow Christmas Tree Skirt - 57cm Base X 28cm Height, Xmas Tree Stand Rattan Wicker Basket Christmas Tree Decoration (Grey)
features: Woven willow rattan basket Christmas tree skirt
This Xmas Tree skirt is great for covering the base of your Christmas Tree
This lovely piece will finish off the appearance of your Xmas Tree to perfection
Our Christmas tree base cover will complement your existing holiday decor and home interior
Fits most christmas trees up to 7ft
Size: 37cm Top Diameter, 57cm Bottom Diameter, Height 28cm
description: Leaving your Christmas tree’s feet exposed could ruin the tree’s entire look. Luckily, we’ve got the perfect thing to cover it with! Make your Christmas tree look tidy and visually appealing with a charming skirt that fits its base perfectly. our Christmas tree skirts will complement your existing holiday decor and home interior, so you always have a picture-perfect setting. Package contains: 1 x Christmas Tree Skirt Natural Kuba Rattan Basket Size: 37cm Top Diameter, 57cm Bottom Diameter, Height 28cm The woven willow tree skirt will look great with any themed tree Can be used year after year, Suitable for all rooms
